content:
Resolve Bulk Activation Collection Issue in AEM Guides Create a new bulk activation collection and publish it for KONE elevator documentation in AEM Guides.

When creating a new bulk activation collection in AEM Guides for KONE elevator documentation, you may encounter issues. To resolve this, follow the steps below.

 Enter a title for your bulk activation map collection and select Create in AEM Guides. Select Open on the success message. Select Edit and then select Add Maps. Locate and add the DITA maps that you want to add to the bulk activation map collection. Select the desired output by turning the sliding button on or off. Select Done.

The bulk activation collection is created and published successfully, and you can view the results in AEM Guides.
author: ai
diff_from_prev:
--- previous+++ current@@ -1,31 +1,40 @@ - - Resolve [Automation] [OnPrem_UUID] [linux] [develop] Create A New Bulk Activation Collection And Publish It - [Automation] [OnPrem_UUID] [linux] [develop] create a new bulk activation collection and publish it + + Resolve Bulk Activation Collection Issue in AEM Guides + Create a new bulk activation collection and publish it for KONE elevator documentation in AEM Guides. + - -

UI automation for UI test: create a new bulk activation collection and publish it on linux platform in develop branch. Please find the results at https://AEM-guides-dev.ci.corp.adobe.com/view/Starling_Regression/job/Starling-ui-tests/1446/allure

+
